external_payload.audit_note: Vermont's largest and oldest gaming store, on the Church Street Marketplace. Yelp (updated 2026), Seven Days, Apple Maps and Wheree list the current address as 152 Church St, Burlington, VT 05401 (an older listing shows 130 Bank St Suite 104, likely a prior location); phone (802) 863-3666. Store explicitly stocks Magic, Warhammer and Warmachine miniatures, board games and Pathfinder/RPGs. Coordinates not independently geocoded this session. Coordinates are an approximate town-level placement (geocoding_source=approximate_town_level), not a survey-precise machine geocode; the street address above is authoritative.
